author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Add a Day 0 Claude authorization step**

This first curriculum step assumes Claude can already respond in GitHub Issues, but the delivery plan and OWNER-ACTION only create the repo and invite the friend; they never have the friend authorize/install the Claude/GitHub integration or choose a copy-paste fallback. In the handed-over private repo, Day 1 can therefore stall before the “repo talks back” payoff. Add a Day 0 account/auth setup step, or rewrite Day 1 so it works through Claude chat plus manual issue comments.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
